notes: L26 Part 2 (act 154) 'Upper binary search — Magnetic Force and the round-up trap', 112.2s, 6 cues. Uses binsearch.py + a number_line helper. READ start/mid/end each cue. 1 -ql iteration, all cues passed first render. Magnetic Force greedy/exchange/round-up math verified (sorted [1,2,4,8,9], m=3, answer gap=3).
